name: Kitiplant
short_description: Adorable cats work together to solve puzzles in Kitiplant. Guide them through challenging grid-based levels, where they must share resources and carefully manage their energy to restore life to once-dormant forests.
detailed_description:
In Kitiplant, you assume the role of a guide, leading these lovable feline companions through a series of challenging grid-based levels. Each level presents a unique puzzle that requires not only sharp problem-solving skills but also collaborative efforts from the cats.



Resource management is a key aspect of Kitiplant's gameplay. The cats must share resources among themselves strategically to progress through the levels. But it's not just about resource sharing, energy management is equally crucial. The cats must carefully balance their energy reserves as they traverse the challenging levels.

FEATURES
  • Handcrafted Levels: 80 handcrafted levels.
  • Simple Controls: Experience easy gameplay with simple mouse controls.
  • Dark/Light modes: Customize your visual experience with dark and light modes.
  • Undo/Reset: Reset and undo actions allow you to effortlessly correct mistakes and explore different strategies by reverting back to a previous state or starting fresh.
